Paddle, Pedal, and Explore Oahu's Windward Coast

Guided kayak and e-bike adventures on the most beautiful side of the island. No experience needed — just bring your sense of adventure.

CPR Certified Guides
5-Star Rated
Free Cancellation

Our Adventures

From the iconic Mokulua Islands to the tranquil waters of Kaneohe Bay. Pick your adventure and let's get outside.

moderate
5 hours

Mokulua Islands Kayak Adventure

Kailua Beach, Oahu

  • Paddle to the iconic Mokulua Islands off Kailua Beach
  • Explore seabird sanctuary and tide pools
  • Snorkel with Hawaiian green sea turtles
$149 per person
Book Now
easy
3–4 hours

Kailua E-Bike Kau Kau Guided Adventure

Kailua Town, Oahu

  • Guided e-bike food tour through Kailua Town and the windward coast
  • Stop at 3–4 local eateries for authentic Hawaiian flavors
  • Cruise scenic coastal paths — the e-bike does the work!
$129 per person
Book Now
moderate
5 hours

Mokulua Twin Islands Guided Kayak Tour

Kailua Beach, Oahu

  • Our signature guided tour to the iconic Mokulua Islands
  • Land on Moku Nui and hike to the summit for 360° views
  • Explore Queen's Bath — a natural tide pool on the island
$169 per person
Book Now
easy
4–5 hours

Popoia Island Guided Kayak Tour

Kailua Beach, Oahu

  • Guided paddle to Popoia Island (Flat Island) — Kailua's hidden gem
  • Snorkel with Hawaiian green sea turtles in protected waters
  • Explore a native seabird sanctuary with your expert guide
$149 per person
Book Now

Why Adventure With Us

We're Oahu locals who know these waters, trails, and coastlines better than anyone. Every tour is led by passionate guides who put safety, fun, and authentic Hawaiian experiences first.

Safety First

All guides are CPR/First Aid certified. Top-quality gear, thorough briefings, and weather monitoring on every tour.

Local Experts

Born-and-raised Oahu guides who share insider knowledge, history, and hidden gems you won't find in guidebooks.

No Experience Needed

Our tours are designed for all skill levels. From beginners to experienced adventurers, we make sure everyone has a great time.

Free Cancellation

Plans change! Cancel up to 24 hours before your tour for a full refund. Weather-related cancellations are always free.

Ready for Your Oahu Adventure?

Reserve your spot today. Tours fill up fast — especially during peak season. Use our live booking calendar below to check availability and secure your date.

Book on FareHarbor 📞 (808) 498-1894

Live Booking Calendar

Loading booking calendar...

Free cancellation up to 24 hours before your tour. Weather-related cancellations always free.

Got Questions? We've Got Answers

No prior experience needed! Our guides provide a full safety briefing and paddling instruction before launch. The route is suitable for beginners in moderate physical condition.
Safety is our top priority. If wind or swell conditions are unsafe, we'll reschedule at no charge or provide a full refund.
Yes, children 8+ can paddle in a tandem kayak with an adult. Kids under 12 must be accompanied by a parent.
'Kau kau' is Hawaiian pidgin for food or to eat. On this tour, you'll eat your way through Kailua — sampling local plate lunches, poke bowls, tropical fruit, shave ice, and more. It's part food tour, part scenic e-bike ride, and 100% delicious.
The tour covers approximately 10–12 miles at a relaxed pace with frequent stops. The e-bike makes hills effortless — you can pedal as much or as little as you like. Most guests are surprised by how easy it is!
Yes, basic bike riding ability is required. If it's been a while, no worries — we offer a quick refresher before departure and the e-bike assist makes starting and stopping much easier than a regular bike.

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
